title: Che Tempo Fa?
gcseTheme: Theme 2: Local, National, International and Global Areas
scenario: You're planning a day out with an Italian friend and discussing the weather.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Fa bel tempo. C'è il sole.
lines.english: The weather is nice. It's sunny.

lines.speaker: giulia
lines.italian: Fa caldo? Voglio andare in spiaggia.
lines.english: Is it hot? I want to go to the beach.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì, fa molto caldo. Trenta gradi!
lines.english: Yes, it's very hot. Thirty degrees!

lines.speaker: giulia
lines.english: Perfect! Shall we go to the sea?

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: Yes! But tomorrow it will rain.

lines.speaker: giulia
lines.italian: Davvero? Ho visto le nuvole questa mattina.
lines.english: Really? I saw the clouds this morning.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: D'inverno qui fa molto freddo e nevica.
lines.english: In winter it's very cold here and it snows.

lines.speaker: giulia
lines.italian: In Italia d'estate fa sempre caldo.
lines.english: In Italy in summer it's always hot.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Preferisco la primavera. Non fa troppo caldo.
lines.english: I prefer spring. It's not too hot.

lines.speaker: giulia
lines.italian: A me piace l'autunno. I colori sono belli.
lines.english: I like autumn. The colours are beautiful.

lines.speaker: giulia
lines.italian: Sì, e una giacca. La sera fa fresco.
lines.english: Yes, and a jacket. In the evening it's cool.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Oggi però andiamo al mare! Prendi il costume!
lines.english: Today though let's go to the sea! Get your swimsuit!

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you say it's cold?
How would you ask what the weather is like?
How would you say it's raining?
